member.name: T:DotNetExtras.Security.Crypto
member.summary: Encrypts and decrypts text using the AES algorithm with 256-bit key, 128-bit initialization vector, 1000 password iterations SHA-256 hash algorithm, and random 64-bit salt.

example.code: string cipherText = Crypto.Encrypt("Hello, world!", "easy1234"); string plainText = Crypto.Decrypt(cipherText, "easy1234");

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Crypto.Encrypt(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Encrypts plain text using a 256-bit AES key and a 128-bit initialization vector (IV) derived from the caller-provided password and random 8-character salt.
member.param: Password from which the encryption key will be derived.
member.returns: Base64-encoded ciphertext that starts with the salt value used for the cryptographic key generation (the salt looks like base64-encoded text, too).
member.remarks: To generate the AES key, the code will use a random 8-character salt made of the base64-encoded characters. The salt will be added in front of the cipher text, so the returned result will look like a valid base64-encoded string.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Crypto.Decrypt(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Decrypts cipher text using a 256-bit AES key and a 128-bit initialization vector (IV) derived from the caller-provided password and random 8-character salt.
member.param: Password from which the decryption key will be derived.
member.returns: Plain text with the salt value removed.
member.remarks: To generate the AES key, the code must use the same password as the one used to encrypt plain text and the 8-character salt included in the beginning of the cipher text that was randomly generated and used for key generation during encryption.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Crypto.CreateKey(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a predictable key from the given password and salt.
member.param: Persistent password used to generate the key.
Random salt used to generate the key.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Crypto.CreateSalt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a random salt of the specified length.
member.returns: Salt value made of the characters in the base64 encoding character set.

member.name: T:DotNetExtras.Security.Hash
member.summary: Implements hashing functions.

member.name: F:DotNetExtras.Security.Hash.HashStringLength
member.summary: Holds hex hash string lengths.

member.name: F:DotNetExtras.Security.Hash.HexHashStringLengthSha384
member.summary: Hex hash string length for SHA384.

member.name: F:DotNetExtras.Security.Hash.HexHashStringLengthSha512
member.summary: Hex hash string length for SHA512.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Hash.Generate(DotNetExtras.Security.HashType,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a hash of plain text with optional salt and return is converted to a hex string.
member.param: Random salt (to be added in front of the plain text before hashing).
member.returns: Hashed value as a hex-encoded, lower-case string (without the plain text salt appended).

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Hash.ToHash(System.String,DotNetExtras.Security.HashType,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a hash for a plain text string with appended optional random salt and returns hash value encoded as hex string with appended salt.
member.param: Length of the random salt (if 0 or negative, no salt will be used).
If set to true the hex encoded salt value will be added to the beginning of the hashed value.
member.returns: Hashed string encoded as hex string which may start with the salt value (also hex encoded).

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Hash.Validate(DotNetExtras.Security.HashType,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies a plain text string against a hash value.
member.returns: True if the hash value matches the hash of the plain text string.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Hash.HexToString(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a hex string to a string.

member.name: T:DotNetExtras.Security.HashType
member.summary: Types of hashing algorithms supported by .NET Core.

member.name: F:DotNetExtras.Security.HashType.SHA256
member.summary: SHA256

member.name: F:DotNetExtras.Security.HashType.SHA384
member.summary: SHA384

member.name: F:DotNetExtras.Security.HashType.SHA512
member.summary: SHA512

member.name: T:DotNetExtras.Security.JsonCharMaskAttribute
member.summary: Applies a character mask to a string property during JSON serialization using `System.Text.Json` (STJ).

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.JsonCharMaskAttribute.#ctor(System.Char,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Number characters to be left unmasked at the start of the string.
Number characters to be left unmasked at the end of the string.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.JsonCharMaskAttribute.CreateConverter(System.Type)
member.summary: Sets a converter that will apply a character mask to a decorated string property.

member.name: T:DotNetExtras.Security.JsonHashMaskAttribute
member.summary: Applies a hash mask to a string property during JSON serialization using `System.Text.Json` (STJ).

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.JsonHashMaskAttribute.#ctor(DotNetExtras.Security.HashType,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Length of the optional random salt to be generated.
If `true`, the salt will be added to the beginning of the hash string.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.JsonHashMaskAttribute.CreateConverter(System.Type)
member.summary: Sets a converter that will apply a hash mask to a decorated string property.

member.name: T:DotNetExtras.Security.JsonLiteralMaskAttribute
member.summary: Allows applying masks to protect sensitive string object properties.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.JsonLiteralMaskAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Literal string value that will replace the string property value (can be `null`).

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.JsonLiteralMaskAttribute.CreateConverter(System.Type)
member.summary: Sets a converter that will apply a literal string mask to a decorated string property.

member.name: T:DotNetExtras.Security.Json.CharMaskStringJsonConverter
member.summary: Masks a string property with a specified character during JSON serialization using `System.Text.Json` (STJ).

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Json.CharMaskStringJsonConverter.#ctor(System.Char,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Number characters to be left unmasked at the start of the string.
Number characters to be left unmasked at the end of the string.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Json.CharMaskStringJsonConverter.Read(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader@,System.Type,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Reads and converts the JSON to type .

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Json.CharMaskStringJsonConverter.Write(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter,System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Writes the masked string value to the JSON element.

member.name: T:DotNetExtras.Security.Json.HashMaskStringJsonConverter
member.summary: Masks a string property with a specified hash value during JSON serialization using `System.Text.Json` (STJ).

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Json.HashMaskStringJsonConverter.#ctor(DotNetExtras.Security.HashType,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Length of the optional random salt to be generated.
If `true`, the salt will be added to the beginning of the hash string.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Json.HashMaskStringJsonConverter.Read(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader@,System.Type,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Reads and converts the JSON to type .

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Json.HashMaskStringJsonConverter.Write(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter,System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Writes the masked string value to the JSON element.

member.name: T:DotNetExtras.Security.Json.LiteralMaskStringJsonConverter
member.summary: Applies a literal string mask to a string property during JSON serialization using `System.Text.Json` (STJ).

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Json.LiteralMaskStringJsonConverter.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Literal string value that will replace the string property value (can be `null`).

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Json.LiteralMaskStringJsonConverter.Read(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader@,System.Type,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Reads and converts the JSON to type .

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Json.LiteralMaskStringJsonConverter.Write(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter,System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Writes the masked string value to the JSON element.

member.name: T:DotNetExtras.Security.Jwt
member.summary: Class for generating and validating JWTs.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Secret from which the encryption key will be derived (encryption key will be extended to 256 characters or longer, which is the minimum).

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Jwt.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Class for generating and validating JWTs.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Secret from which the encryption key will be derived (encryption key will be extended to 256 characters or longer, which is the minimum).

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Jwt.Generate(System.String)
member.summary: Generates a JWT for the specified user email.
member.param: Email of the user for whom the token is generated.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Jwt.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates a JWT.
member.returns: The object if the token is valid; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Jwt.ConvertTo256BitOrLonger(System.String)
member.summary: Extends string to match the minimum key length requirement for the symmetric key algorithm used by JWT.
member.param: String that can be shorter than 256 bits..
member.returns: String that is at least 256-bit long.

member.name: T:DotNetExtras.Security.Password
member.summary: Generates random password, which will not include ambiguous characters, such as I, l, and 1. The generated password will be made of 7-bit ASCII symbols. very four characters will include: - one lower case character - one upper case character - one number - one special symbol (such as '%') in a random order. The password will always start with an alpha-numeric character; it will not start with a special symbol (because some back-end systems do not like certain special characters in the first position).

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Password.Generate
member.summary: Generates a random password.
member.remarks: The length of the generated password will be determined at random. It will be no shorter than the minimum default and no longer than maximum default.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Password.Generate(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a random password of the exact length.

member.name: M:DotNetExtras.Security.Password.Generate(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a random password between the min and max length.
member.remarks: The length of the generated password will be determined at random and it will fall with the range determined by the function parameters.
